calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Continued To May-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEORGE MCSPADDEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the elder abuse cause of action for Plaintiff to indicate what type of elder abuse is asserted (e.g. physical, financial) and to plead facts to each element of this cause of action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint is not uncertain and causes of action are sufficiently alleged and are not duplicative. As to the unjust enrichment cause of action, the demurrer is overruled per Hirsch v. Bank of America (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 708. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEORGE MCSPADDEN Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: reckless disregard of Plaintiff's rights. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
